job_location: Bulgaria (Remote options: Serbia, Romania, Italy, Poland, Greece)

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: balancing delivery speed with long-term scalability and reliability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Explicit tension between delivery speed and reliability is stated twice, alongside strong data-quality/validation language, giving genuine parity between velocity and rigour signals.
evidence.domain_risk: ensuring data quality, operational excellence, and platform reliability through robust validation processes, monitoring, incident management
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Internal BI reporting reliability for a cybersecurity company without explicit financial-reporting, audit, or regulatory language stated.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Lead and develop a team of 2 direct reports; modernizing the BI landscape through the adoption of Microsoft Fabric
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An existing BI team with direct reports and a large established company (1800+ employees, 20,000+ customers) undergoing platform modernization signals a mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Strong SQL (T-SQL) and Microsoft BI stack: SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS (Tabular/Multidimensional), SSRS/Power BI Report Server, Power BI
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise, granular tool stack (SSIS, SSAS, SSRS, Power BI Report Server) and explicit team size give hiring-manager-level detail.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Build scalable semantic models and datasets, enabling self-service dashboards and ad-hoc analysis in Power BI
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on the internal BI platform and its self-service consumers rather than a specific commercial or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Own end-to-end BI delivery; Drive modernization and Microsoft Fabric adoption; Lead and develop a team of 2 direct reports
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: People management responsibility plus owning end-to-end delivery and driving platform modernization are unambiguously strategic.
evidence.ai_role: AI-assisted automation for BI/data work (testing, documentation, or pipeline scripting)
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI-assisted automation for the candidate's own BI/data work is listed as a nice-to-have, placing this as ai_user; note interviews explicitly restrict AI tool use.
evidence.testing_framing: Improve data quality and reliability through validation, monitoring, incident triage, and clear runbooks
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and validation are framed as an owned operational responsibility with defined runbooks, not just a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Improve data quality and reliability through validation, monitoring, incident triage, and clear runbooks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: reliability, incident management, and validation are emphasized as operational concerns, but framed around pipeline/platform stability rather than compliance or stakeholder trust.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: modernizing the BI landscape through the adoption of Microsoft Fabric
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Modernizing and adopting new tooling on top of an existing BI landscape is fix/scale rather than greenfield.
